An EO/IR System integrates Electro-Optical (EO) and Infrared (IR) sensors for optical target identification, target tracking, and comprehensive evidence gathering. It enables surveillance and reconnaissance across various operational scenarios.

items.notes: OctoPod is an integrated sensor pod carrying EO/IR, SLAR radar, laser fluorosensor and other maritime surveillance sensors

evidence.snippet: For more safety in air traffic
We are a globally represented company in specialised aviation and the world market leader in the field of flight inspection systems.

items.notes: AeroFIS® flight inspection system is described as used worldwide for calibration and inspection of navigation systems; this is their primary legacy product line

evidence.snippet:
Hermann-Blenk-Straße 34 - 36
38108 Braunschweig
Deutschland
With AeroForce® X, we offer an innovative, tailor-made complete solution that meets the growing demands in the field of intelligent surveillance and reconnaissance (ISR).
The modular concept of our MALE UAS enables an adaptable design for a wide range of maritime surveillance scenarios.

Our AeroFIS® Flybot is a small unmanned aircraft system (UAS) equipped with measuring devices and based on a multicopter. The AeroFIS® Flybot makes it possible to inspect navigation systems in a simple and cost-effective way.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures complete UAS platforms (AeroForce® X MALE UAS, AeroFIS® Flybot multicopter). Also develops integrated mission management systems and integrates sensors into aircraft.

evidence.snippet:
--------
Flight inspection with precision
Maximum accuracy, integrity and reliable results - our AeroFIS® flight inspection system offers all of this. It is not only characterised by minimal personnel deployment and short flight times, but also offers numerous other advantages. Among other things, AeroFIS® can be used to create flight inspection reports during the flight.

tagline: German OEM producing automated flight inspection systems (AeroFIS®, HeliFIS®), MALE ISR platforms (AeroForce® X), and airborne mission management payloads (AeroMission®, Prometheon, OctoPod). Claims market leadership in flight inspection; production-ready across airframes, payloads, and ground stations. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence on surveillance product maturity and US contract history is sparse.
